working_on.task: Planning Dynamic Loading Indicators and Stream Processing

pending_tasks.task: Feature: Add AiResult.Loading state to AiResult.kt
Feature: Emit dynamic loading messages in SummarizationRepository.kt
Feature: Update MainActivity.kt to render dynamic loading UI states
Architecture: Shift Gemini generation to use Server-Sent Events (streamGenerateContent)
Architecture: Migrate off Chaquopy for Transcript parsing to native Kotlin/OkHttp to drop 2.5s overhead
🟢 LOW: Remove hardcoded '32 Summaries' in MainActivity
🟢 LOW: Add Strict VideoID Regex validation before passing to backend

recent_changes.description: Analyzed per_audit.txt (advocating for Gemini Streaming and dropping Chaquopy for Native Kotlin) and fix_loading_indicator.md (plan for dynamic UI loading states).
Fixed 2 HIGH priority security bugs (Safety Filters & Prompt Injection) and 2 MEDIUM priority performance/UX bugs (Regex hoisting & Removed forced volume). Verified compilation success.

Fact-checked bugs.txt (Performance) and secu_bugs.txt (Security) against actual source code. Found 50% of issues were already fixed. Discovered a new Critical Vulnerability (Safety Settings deactivated). Generated consolidated bugs_reports.md with actionable items.
Fixed W2 (Cached SHA-256 for ModelQuotaManager) and W3 (Removed legacy Retrofit/Backend code, cleaned up NetworkModule and build specs).

Fixed Performance Issues C1, C2, C3: Applied Singleton pattern to avoid re-creation of Repository and Managers; parallelized metadata and transcript fetching in MainActivity to save 500ms+; moved Chaquopy calls to Dispatchers.IO to prevent ANR.
Executed Performance Audit. Found 3 critical issues (blocking I/O, synchronous remote fetching, non-singleton manager creations) that severely impacts Android UX.

errors_encountered.error: Chaquopy block main thread causing ANR
errors_encountered.solution: Wrap pythonManager object calls inside Flow using .flowOn(Dispatchers.IO)

errors_encountered.error: Memory and Resource Overhead from repeated Object creations
errors_encountered.solution: Apply double-checked locking Singleton pattern to ModelQuotaManager and SummarizationRepository

decisions_made.reason: Many old performance/security issues were already fixed in previous sessions. Re-evaluating saved time and highlighted real priorities.
Wait for metadata via async before fetching summary to update UI instantly and guarantee history data consistency.
Standalone logic via local IP is now fully verified and bypasses YouTube blocks.
Gemini API uses OkHttp directly, Retrofit and its converters were bloating the APK unused.
